log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Round 1: Too far for melee. Spiritual Weapon + ranged.
MOVEMENT: Moves toward Half-Elf — Armored Tank.
ACTION: Cast Spiritual Weapon (Level 2 slot). melee_spell attack vs Half-Elf — Armored Tank.
→ melee_spell attack: [d20:15+3=18 vs AC 20] MISS.
ACTION: Cast Sacred Flame (Level 0). DC 11 DEX save on Half-Elf — Armored Tank.
→ Half-Elf — Armored Tank: DEX save [d20:19+7=26 vs DC 11] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Half-Elf — Armored Tank --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 5 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):11+1=12 vs DC 15] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):7+1=8 vs DC 15] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):5+1=6 vs DC 15] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):16+1=17 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Mage: WIS save [d20:8+4=12 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ 4/5 targets affected.

REASONING: Ally charmed by Hypnotic Pattern! Shaking Cult Fanatic awake.
